response.overview: Recovering funds in an on-chain (self-custody) wallet ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 depends on why you need to recover them. If you lost your device or uninstalled the app, ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 you can restore access by reinstalling the app and importing your wallet using your 12, 18, or 24-word recovery phrase.  To speak directly onto Onchain wallet, first contact ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 the official support team of Onchain platform, wallet, or exchange available on its official website or app. Onchain offer help via support tickets, live chat, email, phone ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850, or help centers. Before reaching out ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850, gather relevant details such as your account email, transaction ID, wallet address, and a description of the issue.  Legitimate on-chain wallet support teams ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 will never ask for your 12-word or 24-word recovery phrase.
